# F033 Conservative Floor Gate

## Decision
`F033_CONSERVATIVE_GATE_ZERO_FALLBACK`

## Purpose
F032 found nonzero residual signal but failed one held-out recall no-regression check. F033 reruns the same deterministic low-compute setup and applies a stricter train-only risk gate: smaller residual scales plus required positive train slack for transition, delta cosine, and recall.

## Selection Rule
```json
{
  "scale_grid": [
    0.0,
    0.025,
    0.05,
    0.1,
    0.15,
    0.2,
    0.25
  ],
  "train_delta_margin": 0.005,
  "train_recall_margin": 0.05,
  "train_transition_margin": 0.002
}
```

## Mean Metrics
- selected residual scale mean: `0.000000`
- selected nonzero fraction: `0.000000`
- heldout local floor preserved: `True`
- selected transition: `0.333054`
- local floor transition: `0.333054`
- selected delta cosine: `0.912222`
- local floor delta cosine: `0.912222`
- selected recall@1: `0.859259`
- local floor recall@1: `0.859259`
- selected floor gap transition: `0.000000` (min `0.000000`)
- selected floor gap delta cosine: `0.000000` (min `0.000000`)
- selected floor gap recall: `0.000000` (min `0.000000`)

## Promotion Status
No model is promoted. This branch only determines whether residual deployment can be made safe by stricter train-only calibration.
